_comment: Evaluation items for evaluate_models.py. Translation: patient phrasing plus acceptable clinical terms (hit = any term appears in the model output, case-insensitive). Classification: feature-style descriptions with expected category labels.

translation.patient: I've got the blues and nothing helps
My heart is racing all the time
I just can't sleep at night anymore
I feel like throwing up every morning
I'm worn out no matter how much I rest
I can't catch my breath climbing the stairs
My joints ache all the time
I keep getting the shakes in my hands
The room spins whenever I stand up

classification.text: references to medical symptoms, diagnoses, and treatment plans
classification.label: clinical

classification.text: mentions of hospitals, physicians, and prescribed medication
classification.label: clinical

classification.text: terminology describing disease progression and patient outcomes
classification.label: clinical

classification.text: the color blue in descriptions of sky, water, and clothing
classification.label: off_target

classification.text: music genres such as blues, jazz, and rock in reviews
classification.label: off_target

classification.text: competitive racing events and sports commentary
classification.label: off_target

classification.text: sentence-final punctuation marks and quotation delimiters
classification.label: structural

classification.text: the definite article at the start of a noun phrase
classification.label: structural

classification.text: newline and indentation tokens in formatted text
classification.label: structural
